source: TikTok Shop Seller Center (public docs), verified 2026-06-24. Fees evolve frequently - verify before pricing decisions.

baseCommission.note: 6% flat for all US categories. Payment processing is included in this rate.

fbtFulfillment.note: Mandatory Fulfilled by TikTok since March 31, 2026.

refundAdminFee.note: 20% of referral fee, capped at $5 per SKU.

creatorCommission.note: Seller-set commission rate paid to TikTok creators/affiliates. ON TOP of the 6% base commission.

fully_managed.label: Fully managed (FBT)
fully_managed.sellerResponsibility: Ship bulk to TikTok consolidation warehouse

disclaimer: TikTok Shop fees change frequently. The 6% base commission (incl. payment processing), FBT fulfillment ($2.86-$3.58), and 1% cross-border fees are consistent with 2026 documentation. Always confirm in TikTok Seller Center.
